name: aala-likec4
description: LikeC4 workspace for L1/L2/L3 architecture diagrams.

scripts.export:L2: likec4 export png -o ../docs/diagrams --flat --seq -f containersView -f writePath -f readPath -f blastRadiusPath -f multiTenancy L2
scripts.export:L3: likec4 export png -o ../docs/diagrams --flat --seq -f extractionView -f conflictEngineView -f blastRadiusView -f projectionView -f prBotView -f treeIndexView -f queryServiceView -f generationServiceView -f evalFrameworkView L3
scripts.export: npm run export:L1 && npm run export:L2 && npm run export:L3
scripts.validate: likec4 validate L1 && likec4 validate L2 && likec4 validate L3
